kobeGreen:CamouflagePower.NAME: Camouflage
DESCRIPTIONS: As long as you have #yCamouflage, you have #b3 additional #yDexterity. Lose #b1 #yCamouflage whenever you play a #ySkill.

kobeGreen:FreeSkillPower.NAME: Free Skill Power
DESCRIPTIONS: Ignore energy cost on the next #ySkill you play.
